sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_col XML, value_col VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_data (id, xml_col, value_col) VALUES (1, '123', 'example1');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, xml_col, value_col) VALUES (2, '456', 'example2');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, xml_col, value_col) VALUES (3, 'NULL', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, xml_col, value_col) VALUES (4, '789', 'example3');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, xml_col, value_col) VALUES (5, 'NaN', 'example4');
SELECT log_message(CONCAT('Fetched value: ', xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col))) FROM test_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT log_message(CONCAT('Summed values: ', SUM(CAST(xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) AS INT))) OVER (PARTITION BY value_col) ) FROM test_data;
SELECT log_message(CONCAT('Combined Entries: ', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE value_col IS NOT NULL)) ) FROM dual;
SELECT log_message(CONCAT('Filtering NULL: ', xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col))) FROM test_data WHERE value_col IS NULL;
SELECT log_message(CONCAT('Max ID: ', MAX(id), ', Value: ', xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col))) FROM test_data GROUP BY value_col HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
